user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable time off / attendance alerts when attendance is not recorded, so that employees are reminded to record their attendance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configure Alerts screen; When I set "Do you support time off / attendance alert when attendance is not recorded?" to Yes and Save; Then the attendance alert setting is persisted

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable announcement alerts for employees, so that employees are notified of new announcements
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configure Alerts screen; When I set "Do you want to alert the employee on announcement?" to Yes and Save; Then the announcement alert setting is persisted

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable alerts for pending tasks, so that employees are reminded of tasks awaiting action
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configure Alerts screen; When I set "Do you want to alert the employee on Pending tasks?" to Yes and Save; Then the pending task alert setting is persisted

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable alerts for overdue tasks, so that employees are notified when tasks pass their due date
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configure Alerts screen; When I set "Do you want to alert the employee on overdue tasks?" to Yes and Save; Then the overdue task alert setting is persisted

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save all alert configuration selections together, so that my alert preferences take effect across the system
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set my alert configuration options; When I click Save; Then all selections are stored and applied
